properties.displayName: Storage accounts should restrict cross tenant replication in Mission Platform products and services
properties.description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. This policy helps enforce data residency and security boundaries by preventing cross-tenant replication of storage accounts. It ensures that object replication policies do not inadvertently replicate data to storage accounts outside the intended tenant.

metadata.displayName: Storage Account Disable External replication effect
metadata.description: Specify the Storage Account Disable External replication effect
